mechanism_narrative: A sustained month-over-month decline in the federal funds rate reduces borrowing costs and lowers equity discount rates, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Rank IC < 0.03 over any 3-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns during rate cuts are not significantly higher than baseline.

mechanism_narrative: When the unemployment rate crosses above 5.0%, it signals labor market deterioration and weakening consumer spending, which reduces corporate earnings expectations and produces negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite negative signal, or trigger fails to predict direction with p < 0.05.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous month-over-month increases in core inflation and the federal funds rate indicate a restrictive monetary policy response to price pressures, which compresses profit margins and equity valuations, yielding negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Joint signal shows no predictive power (Rank IC < 0.02) over 60-day horizon, or positive returns dominate during simultaneous rises.

mechanism_narrative: A consecutive 3-month decline in housing starts during a late-cycle expansion reflects collapsing residential investment demand, which drags on broader economic activity and generates negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Housing starts declines in late-cycle periods fail to predict negative returns (t-test p > 0.05), or signal accuracy drops below 55%.

mechanism_narrative: A positive month-over-month change in the index of industrial production reflects strengthening manufacturing and utility output, which boosts near-term corporate revenue expectations and drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns during industrial production expansions are not significantly higher than baseline, or Rank IC < 0.03 over rolling windows.

mechanism_narrative: When real personal consumption expenditures exceed 370,000 million dollars, it indicates robust consumer spending power that supports corporate earnings growth, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX forward returns are negative in > 50% of instances when RSAFS exceeds the threshold, or signal loses predictive significance (p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent month-over-month increases in total nonfarm payrolls and real GDP signal synchronized labor market and economic expansion, which reinforces earnings growth trajectories and yields positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Interaction term shows no incremental predictive power over single proxies, or 60-day returns are negative in majority of synchronized growth periods.

mechanism_narrative: When the consumer price index exceeds 205 during a monetary tightening phase, it reflects entrenched inflation that forces sustained higher interest rates, compressing equity multiples and generating negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: High inflation readings during tightening fail to predict negative returns, or positive returns dominate in > 60% of triggered cases.
